# GlassGate

> GlassGate is an Agent Delivery Network that turns websites into structured, verified endpoints for AI agents.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://glasgate.ai/) — Overview of the Agent Delivery Network and how it works.
- [Platform](https://glasgate.ai/platform) — The GlassGate crawling, structuring and delivery pipeline.
- [Pricing](https://glasgate.ai/pricing) — Plans for teams of all sizes.
- [Docs](https://glasgate.ai/docs) — API reference, quickstart and integration guides.

## Agent-readable Mirrors

- [Full Markdown Corpus](/generated/demo-glasgate/llms-full.txt)
- [AI Index JSON](/generated/demo-glasgate/ai-index.json)

- [Home](https://glasgate.ai/) → [.md](/generated/demo-glasgate/pages/home.md) [.json](/generated/demo-glasgate/pages/home.json)
- [Platform](https://glasgate.ai/platform) → [.md](/generated/demo-glasgate/pages/platform.md) [.json](/generated/demo-glasgate/pages/platform.json)

## Usage Notes

This file is generated by glasgate.ai and points to public,
canonical-aware representations of the visible website content.
All mirrors match the content visible to human users.
